title: Address book
emptyTitle: Save addresses for quick & secure access
emptyDescription: Effortlessly manage your withdrawals by saving wallet addresses in one place. Add custom labels to stay organized and speed up your transactions.
confirmNavigation: Your address book is being updated. Leaving this page may cause unexpected results. Are you sure you want to leave?
saveError: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
removeDescription: This contact will be removed from your address book.

validation.nicknameTooShort: Nickname must be at least 3 characters.
validation.nicknameTooLong: Nickname must be at most 64 characters.
validation.nicknameAlreadyUsed: This nickname is already in use.
validation.invalidAddress: Please enter a valid ICP or ICRC1 address.

toast.anonymousNotAllowed: Please sign in to manage the address book.
toast.saveError: There was an unexpected issue while updating the address book.
toast.tooMany: You can't add more than {{limit}} addresses.

maxReached: You have reached the maximum of 20 saved addresses.
